com.jsyn.unitgen

Class MixerMonoRamped

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.jsyn.unitgen.UnitGenerator
      • com.jsyn.unitgen.MixerMono
        • com.jsyn.unitgen.MixerMonoRamped
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    UnitSink, UnitSource

    public class MixerMonoRamped
extends MixerMono
    Similar to MixerMono but the gain and amplitude ports are smoothed using short linear ramps. So you can control them with knobs and not hear any zipper noise.
    Author:
    Phil Burk (C) 2014 Mobileer Inc
